falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes below 4000 (key support level) on 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Confirms a breakdown in the pattern, invalidating the 'bottom' hypothesis and proving the current HOLD signal is incorrect

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume on the NASDAQ surges to 25% above the 20-day average while prices make a new 6-month low
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Indicates panic selling and bear market acceleration, contradicting the pattern's implied stabilization phase

falsification_conditions.condition: The CBOE VIX spikes above 30 (volatility threshold) and remains above 28 for 7 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Signals extreme market fear and potential continuation of the downtrend, refuting the pattern's implied 'bottom' formation

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
